author: Hampering
text:
plugin: shim legacy push/sync onto participant contract

bl-b1dd. Wraps each balls-plugin-{name} subprocess plugin in a
LegacyPluginParticipant per SPEC §12: subscriptions derive from
sync_on_change, projection scoped to external.<name>.*, BestEffort
policy preserves today's swallow-and-warn observable.

The dispatcher in plugin::{dispatch_push, dispatch_sync} replaces
run_plugin_push and run_plugin_sync; lifecycle.rs, basic.rs, and
sync.rs all route through participant::run. No parallel old/new
dispatch — every legacy plugin now runs through the negotiation
primitive.

Existing plugin integration tests pass unchanged. Unit coverage in
plugin/{participant,dispatch}_tests.rs pins the SPEC §11
subscription mapping and BestEffort-routing regression as a guard
against future bypass.
